notes:
Validation run covering state.json, 8 receipts, receipt-schema.json, sequencing.yaml, asset-manifest.schema.json, and proof-of-life.manifest.json.

Each completed[] entry carries agent+ts. The single in_progress[] entry for data-schema-keeper carries agent+started_ts (expected mid-flight state).

sequencing.yaml prerequisite resolution — PASS: All prerequisite references resolve to valid agent keys within the yaml (r3f-scaffolder is a valid external entry point, not in the yaml's agent list but not required to be). No cycles detected; dependency graph is a clean DAG: r3f-scaffolder -> scene-architect-3d -> {physics-engine-3d, asset-pipeline-3d, input-controller-3d} -> screen-grid-architect -> {save-bridge, screen-loader} -> edge-detector -> screen-transition-fx. data-schema-keeper and code-quality-reviewer have empty prerequisites.

sequencing.yaml agent definition files — KNOWN GAPS (informational, not FAIL): screen-grid-architect, save-bridge, screen-loader, edge-detector, screen-transition-fx have no .claude/agents/<name>.md — these are documented known gaps queued for later authoring. All other agents (scene-architect-3d, physics-engine-3d, asset-pipeline-3d, input-controller-3d, data-schema-keeper, code-quality-reviewer) have definition files confirmed present.

asset-manifest.schema.json — PASS: Valid JSON Schema draft-07 ($schema field present, type=object, required=[screen_id], properties block defined, additionalProperties=true at root and all item levels).

proof-of-life.manifest.json — PASS: Required field screen_id present (value: proof-of-life). Extra field _note is permitted by additionalProperties=true. Structurally valid against the schema.
